_comment2: PP29 Configuration - EDIT THESE PATHS FOR YOUR ENVIRONMENT
_comment3: Copy this file to config.json and update the paths below
_comment5: - Use double backslashes in JSON: C:\\Users\\name\\PP29
_comment7: - ~ expands to the current user's home folder
_sap_input_path_help: Network drive where SAP auto-downloads the 13 daily .txt files. The script does NOT recurse into PP29_Readdone_* subfolders; point this at the folder where the loose .txt files land.
_access_excel_path_help: OPTIONAL: Path where MS Access currently saves daily .xls files. Used by consolidate --source excel to read historical data.
_daily_output_path_help: Where daily generated Excel files are saved. Example for local drive: '~\Desktop\PP29\output\daily' resolves to C:\Users\<you>\Desktop\PP29\output\daily
_consolidated_output_path_help: Where consolidated/comparison Excel files are saved
_db_path_help: SQLite database for historical data storage (single file, portable)
_num_periods_help: Number of future periods to include in output (matching Access pivot)
_entities_help: The 13 entity codes that SAP exports daily. Used to find matching .txt files.
